title: Buttery Bouncy Qq Argentinian Kid-Friendly Scallop-Shell Bake
description: A fun and kid-friendly Argentinian dish perfect for a family dinner! This bake features a bouncy QQ texture from the scallop shells, along with a delicious buttery flavor.

ingredients.name: Scallop Shells
ingredients.notes: Large, clean shells are best for this recipe.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Salted or unsalted, whichever you prefer.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality oil for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: Don't overdo it, salt is not necessary in large quantities.

ingredients.name: Black Pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground pepper is always best.

instructions: Rinse the scallop shells and pat them dry with a paper towel.
Cut the lettuce into small pieces and place them in the scallop shells.
Cut the butter into small pieces and place them on top of the lettuce.
Drizzle the olive oil over the lettuce and butter.
Sprinkle the salt and black pepper over the top.
Place the scallop shells on a baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the shells from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes.
Serve the bouncy, buttery qq Argentinian kid-friendly dish hot, garnished with additional lettuce if desired.
